title: Unexpected error `baseBuiltinFunc.vecEvalInt() should never be called, please contact the TiDB team for help`
key_bug_features: Executing prepared query with NULL parameters
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), active BOOL);
INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (1, 'Alice', TRUE), (2, 'Bob', FALSE);
PREPARE stmt FROM 'SELECT (NULLIF(?, t1.id) OR t1.active) FROM t1 WHERE t1.id = ?';
